SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-15-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:16am
Judge Pro Tem Guy Kornblum, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Phuong T. Nguyen appears in Pro Per. Respondents, Binh Lam & Kim Kieu appear in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Kornblum.

9:46am
Matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-05-2010 Judgment Entered
